What are the requirements?

subtasks.name: Review the quote and scope with the client / architect
Build WeQuote with options
subtasks.notes: Use bundles. And adjust quantities. Make sure the pricing is current.

subtasks.name: Populate project details into WeQuote
subtasks.notes:
Include:

    Client/Contractor name
    Project name
    Site address

subtasks.name: Get client approval of quote and scope
Update Status in WeQuote to "Accepted"
Authorize Purchase Orders from WeQuote
If approved, send authorised POs to suppliers
Create subtasks below with PO numbers in Asana
Manage changed purchase orders
subtasks.notes:
Guidelines

Create Changeorder in WeQuote, save PDF in iCloud folder. Merge once approved.
 
When a change order is created the NAME of the Change order must start with the number of the change order - starting at 1, followed by the Original SYSTEM, then the brief description of the change then the date of the change order

Generate report with Same Convention (Number,Change,System,Date)

EG
1|WAP changed|Network|7Sep2023

name: On-Site Team Management
notes:
Standard Operating Procedure

    Discuss project budget (50% installation quoted)
    Load budget into Harvest
    Send PO to sub-contractor
    Once confirmed, we raise the batch of invoices into XERO with the relevant invoice number, contract labour as a GL and ensure that the price matches to the invoice

subtasks.name: Review scope with technicians
Train technicians on how to log time on site using Harvest
Schedule work in the calendar
Assign installation tasks to technicians (all feedback captured on Asana tasks)
subtasks.notes: Sub-contractors might need guest access to the Asana board

subtasks.name: Track time on site using Harvest
subtasks.notes:
Each entry must include:

    Log project
    Task type
    Time
    Notes

Ensure that weekly all technicians have logged all work for the week

subtasks.name: Coordinate infrastructure on site with contractor and electricians

name: Final Snagging
notes:
Ensure the installation represents our ART value
    Ensure all systems are complete and polished for the client before hand over to Sales for Sales to hand over to client

name: Snag Installation
notes:
Debugging Procedure

    Draw the setup
    Start at one end
    Bypass each component one at a time
    Identify the problematic component
    Resolve

You can list the snags below as subtasks

subtasks.name: Resolve all installation snags

name: Configure CCTV  (mandatory checklist)
notes: https://app.asana.com/0/8367232230604/ https://app.asana.com/0/349302067847971/  ... mandatory checklist for all projects moving forward

subtasks.name: has recording schedule been set up  ?
has motion detection been activated on each camera to trigger recording?
HDD installed and initialized?
are all cameras angled and fine tuned for optimal view?
anylytics been set up and walk tested (intrusions/line crossings  etc...)
has the client signed up for offsite monitoring?
all cameras been initialised onto NVr with static IPs?
all Cameras named accordingly?
all firmware up to date?
time synced across all devices?
NVR reboot once a week schedule added?
Mobile app set up with logins for clients?
NVR claimed/added to our portal for remote management
attach screenshots/pics of all the above completed as our reference

name: Documentation

Notes
